demographic_audit_note: Audited Atlantis demographics against Northcrest face sheet. Verified Medicare Advantage PPO status. Corrected patient phone number in Atlantis; facility record had a transposed digit. Address confirmed as single-story residential.
home_vs_ltc_determination: Social Worker confirmed discharge goal is Home with HHA services for gait training and UTI monitoring; LTC is not being considered at this time.
weekly_facility_update: Week 2 Check-in: SW reports UTI is clear. PT noted 'freezing' gait episodes related to Parkinson's. Target discharge set for next Wednesday. PN initiated education on MA post-discharge visit.
v_card_and_flyer_status: Program flyer delivered to patient; V-Card successfully inserted into the daughter's (POA) smartphone during the Stage 2 education session.
pre_dc_pulse_call_result: Pulse call conducted 24 hours prior to D/C. Daughter confirmed home is ready but expressed confusion because the HHA intake nurse called her with a medication list that does not match the SNF’s current bedside list.
atlantis_final_sync: D/C Date of 10/25 and First Visit Date of 10/26 successfully logged in Atlantis sync module.
ma_visit_booking: MA scheduled for 10/26 at 09:00 AM. Physical appointment card with Care Coordinator contact info handed to patient during the bedside handoff.
narrative_summary: Patient was triaged in Stage 1 with a focus on gait safety and UTI follow-up. During Stage 2 maintenance, PN identified a discrepancy between the facility's medication records and the HHA's intake data, specifically regarding Parkinson's dosages. PN escalated this handoff data mismatch to the SW to ensure clinical alignment, ultimately securing a successful transition with the first home visit scheduled within the 24-hour window.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Handoff_Data_Mismatch: Discrepancy identified between SNF medication list and HHA intake records regarding Sinemet frequency.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: Handoff_Data_Mismatch: Discrepancy identified between SNF medication list and HHA intake records regarding Sinemet frequency.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Atlantis demographics audit reveals outdated emergency contact (out-of-state son) vs local daughter/POA.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: Atlantis demographics audit reveals outdated emergency contact (out-of-state son) vs local daughter/POA.

format_2_triples.situation: HHA records show an allergy to Cipro that is not listed in the SNF's current discharge summary for the UTI treatment.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Flagged the data discrepancy to the Social Worker for clinical reconciliation with the nursing staff.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Verifying logistics and data accuracy: Flagged the data discrepancy to the Social Worker for clinical reconciliation with the nursing staff.

format_2_triples.situation: Daughter is concerned about how the MA visit differs from the HHA nurse visit.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Educated family on the specific role of the MA in monitoring and program benefits.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Educating on program expectations: Educated family on the specific role of the MA in monitoring and program benefits.

format_2_triples.situation: HHA intake coordinator reports they have not received the final updated med list 24 hours before discharge.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Escalated the missing data to the SW to ensure the HHA has the correct orders before the patient arrives home.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Escalating to SW for resolution: Escalated the missing data to the SW to ensure the HHA has the correct orders before the patient arrives home.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Wait for the Social Worker and the HHA intake team to resolve the medication list discrepancies through their standard clinical channels before attempting to schedule the MA visit.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the SW boundary regarding clinical documentation and avoids PN involvement in medication reconciliation, which is a banned action.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Flag the specific handoff data mismatch to the SW, verify with the daughter that she has the correct SNF discharge packet, and confirm the HHA has the final version to ensure the 24-hour MA visit remains viable.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Follows the Stage 3 checklist for final coordination and handoff verification without crossing into clinical management.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Review the patient's facility EMR to find the most recent physician order for Sinemet and call the HHA clinical director to manually update their intake form to match.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Violates the Banned Actions by touching the facility EMR and managing clinical medication data, which is the sole responsibility of the SW and clinical staff.
